3217990.name: Aim Trainer Gauntlet
3217990.description:
***WARNING***

This game is complete garbage. I made this during a course to learn unreal engine and posted it for 2 reasons:

   To learn the Steamworks API and How to upload to steam

   and a very simple way to share it with my friends
With that being said, feel free to review the game as you see fit. As said below, it will not be updated and it will never change. If that doesn't suit you, don't play it.

---------------------

Aim Trainer Gauntlet is the first game made by the solo creator, Wingpoo. Thumbsucker Studio presents the bare bones boring ol' aim trainer that fights back. Expect bugs with no support as this is posted for my friends to see my first creation.

Controls

WASD - Move

Mouse - Look

E- Interact

Space bar - Jump

Left Shift - Sprint

Left Click - Shoot

Right Click - Aim

No you can't shoot while sprinting, that's like running with skizzers...
